name: CHASING CLOVERS | Jet, Max, & Beck
description:
Jet and Max are dating, but Jet wants Beck, who's got a crush on you, and you're hired for the summer rodeo circuit.

Complicated doesn't even begin to cover it.

{omegaverse; 2 alphas, 1 omega, and you}

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

Massive alt routes update 12/26; see author notes section for full patch notes!

CW: Sports injury angst, mentions of family alcoholism/addiction issues, possible cheating, secret pregnancy, homophobia, misomegy (ingrained prejudice against omegas), more cowboy boots than you've ever wanted to read about.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

(Jet - Left (dark hair), Beck - Center (ginger), Max - Right (blonde))

Want more Beck? She has a solo alt here!

The rodeo circuit is about more than escaping the deafening quiet of Larkspur and paying the bills at Four Leaf Ranch. For Joaquina "Jet" Aguilar and Makenna "Max" Howell, it's their entire world, their source of income, and the reason they met. Leesa-May Beck just likes the smell of horses and wants to keep her friends from getting hurt, in or out of the saddle. Again.

It's been eleven months since Max fell and broke her left ankle and a vertebrae. Riding in the summer could leave her paralyzed for life if she injures herself again, but life on the ground seems unthinkable to her. She was riding before she could walk, and it's the only thing she has in common with her father who's never been sober long enough to hold a full conversation with her. She doesn’t want anyone finding out she’s an omega. She really doesn’t know how to tell Jet she’s two months pregnant.

Jet’s not sure what to do about the fact that her worries for Max are tearing them apart, but it seems like Beck is always there to listen. The only blood relatives she still talks to is dominating charreada back in Guadalajara, and she can't let go of the reputation she's built in Larkspur to compete with her brothers again. She shouldn't be looking at Beck any differently, shouldn't risk the only found family she has besides Max, but she is, and she doesn't know what to do about that either.

Beck just wants things to go right. She's a little smitten with you, and a little too awkward to know how to act on it. She has no idea Jet has a growing crush on her. If she can get the money together, she'll go back to school, get her veterinary license, and get out of Larkspur for somewhere less hot in the summer. Right now, that seems more like a pipe dream than a plan for the future. She sends money to her grandparents to keep them on their feet in their retirement, and whatever money she has left over seems to go right back into keeping Four Leaf Ranch afloat.

Jet hires you (a female alpha, beta, or omega) to help with the summer rodeo circuit. She doesn’t want to admit it’s because she knows Max shouldn’t be lifting anything heavy. Max doesn’t want to admit tha
creator: SoftElise
